title: schizanthus tricolor
intro: Schizanthus tricolor, also known as the butterfly flower or tricolor schizanthus, is a flowering plant native to South America, characterized by its vibrant yellow, blue, and red flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Schizanthus tricolor include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in infusions and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
